ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan entry */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Code representing the county for the loan */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code representing the state for the loan */,
  "total_kabbage_loans" INTEGER /* Total number of Kabbage loans issued */,
  "total_county_loans" INTEGER /* Total number of loans issued in the county */,
  "percent_of_total" REAL /* Percentage of total loans relative to the state or county */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the loan */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was issued */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date the loan is due */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., approved, denied, paid off) */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmer or agricultural business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_county_code FOREIGN KEY ("county_code") REFERENCES counties ("county_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code representing the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the state */,
  "agricultural_output" REAL /* Total agricultural output of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_code" TEXT /* Code representing the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Full name of the county */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the county */,
  "agricultural_output" REAL /* Total agricultural output of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the loan type */,
  "loan_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type (e.g., Kabbage Loans) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "interest_rate_range" TEXT /* Range of interest rates for the loan type */,
  "maximum_loan_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount that can be loaned under this type */,
  "minimum_loan_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount that can be loaned under this type */,
  "repayment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of repayment for the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the application */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount requested in the loan application */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the application was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the application was denied */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmer or agricultural business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, loan officer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan history record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the history record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., approved, denied, paid off) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of status change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the loan status change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the loan status */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status was last updated */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmer or agricultural business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_history_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_history_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farmers" (
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farmer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the farmer */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the agricultural business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the farmer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the farmer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the farmer */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Code representing the county where the farmer operates */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code representing the state where the farmer operates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the farmer's record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farmer_id")
)
